title: Lutdze
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Lutdze''''' was an [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The ''Lutdze'' was part of a Rebel fleet mobilizing at the [[Delfii system/Legends|Delfii system]] prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Behind the scenes==
In ''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'' the ships cargo says 'Ackbar'. Whether [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] had visited the ship at the same time as [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele's]] recon mission is unknown.
